# Quid public website summary

Quid is an AI-assisted admissions concierge for senior living communities. It supports the non-clinical workflow around website inquiries, tour coordination, approved follow-up, stalled-inquiry tracking, daily summaries, and staff handoffs.

## What Quid helps with

- Acknowledging website inquiries with community-approved language
- Offering and confirming staff-controlled tour times
- Sending approved reminders and post-tour follow-up
- Keeping new, booked, stalled, overdue, and needs-attention inquiries visible
- Pausing routine communication when a family replies or asks a sensitive question
- Routing clinical, medication, eligibility, and care-assessment questions to designated staff
- Giving admissions leaders a concise daily view of activity and exceptions

## What Quid does not do

Quid does not provide residential or clinical care, make admissions or eligibility decisions, recommend levels of care, answer medical questions, replace admissions staff, replace a community CRM, or guarantee move-ins.

## Operating approach

Quid starts narrowly: one community, one website inquiry source, and one tour calendar. The managed 30-day pilot maps the current workflow, approves messages and handoff rules, launches the agreed process carefully, and reports what Quid handled, what staff handled, and what needs adjustment.

The 30-day pilot is $1,000 one-time. It is a paid implementation engagement, not a free trial or refundable deposit. Managed Quid operations cost $899 per month per community if the community chooses to continue.

## Key public pages

- [Homepage](https://get-quid.site/): product definition and overview
- [See Quid in Action](https://get-quid.site/see-quid-in-action/): admissions dashboard and daily workflow
- [How It Works](https://get-quid.site/how-it-works/): inquiry-to-tour workflow
- [Human Handoffs](https://get-quid.site/human-handoffs/): responsible AI boundaries and staff routing
- [30-Day Pilot](https://get-quid.site/pilot/): implementation scope, weekly plan, pricing, and application
- [Meet Quid](https://get-quid.site/meet-quid/): walkthrough request
- [Resources](https://get-quid.site/resources/): practical senior living admissions guides
- [Assisted Living Admissions Automation](https://get-quid.site/assisted-living-admissions-automation/): routine inquiry, tour, reminder, and staff-handoff workflow for assisted living communities
- [Senior Living Inquiry Follow-Up Automation](https://get-quid.site/senior-living-inquiry-follow-up-automation/): controlled website inquiry acknowledgement, tour coordination, approved follow-up, and stalled-inquiry visibility
- [Senior Living Tour Scheduling Software](https://get-quid.site/senior-living-tour-scheduling-software/): staff-controlled tour availability, confirmations, reminders, rescheduling, and human handoffs
- [Free Senior Living Inquiry-Flow Grader](https://get-quid.site/senior-living-inquiry-flow-grader/): a two-minute self-assessment of the visible website inquiry-to-tour journey

## Practical guides

- [Senior Living Admissions Automation](https://get-quid.site/resources/senior-living-admissions-automation/)
- [Senior Living Inquiry Response Time](https://get-quid.site/resources/senior-living-inquiry-response-time/)
- [Senior Living Inquiry-to-Tour Website Audit](https://get-quid.site/resources/senior-living-inquiry-to-tour-audit/): original July 2026 field research covering 25 public community website journeys across nine states
- [How to Increase Assisted Living Occupancy](https://get-quid.site/resources/how-to-increase-assisted-living-occupancy/): practical inquiry-to-tour conversion improvements before buying more leads
- [Senior Living Tour Follow-Up](https://get-quid.site/resources/senior-living-tour-follow-up/)
- [Daily Admissions Summary](https://get-quid.site/resources/senior-living-daily-admissions-summary/)

## Software alternative guides

- [Aline Alternatives](https://get-quid.site/resources/alternatives/aline-alternatives/)
- [Further Alternatives](https://get-quid.site/resources/alternatives/further-alternatives/)
- [ECP CRM Alternatives](https://get-quid.site/resources/alternatives/ecp-crm-alternatives/)
- [WelcomeHome Alternatives](https://get-quid.site/resources/alternatives/welcomehome-alternatives/)
- [Advantage Anywhere Alternatives](https://get-quid.site/resources/alternatives/advantage-anywhere-alternatives/)

These guides use official public vendor information reviewed in July 2026. They separate CRM replacement, multi-channel AI engagement and focused admissions workflow options. They are not rankings or claims of verified integration.

## Safety and privacy boundary

Public forms ask about a community's admissions workflow, not residents. Visitors are instructed not to submit resident names, diagnoses, medications, payment information, or medical details. Quid's public content is operational guidance and does not provide medical, clinical, legal, regulatory, or compliance advice.

## Contact

Request a walkthrough at https://get-quid.site/meet-quid/.
